headline: Fox, Comcast Remain Big Winners of 2026 World Cup, Even With Team USA's Exit
summary: Viewership is breaking records for media partners of the 2026 World Cup. Fox and Comcast are set to win even with Team USA exiting the tournament.

headline: Fox Corp - Class A (NASDAQ:FOXA): A Decent Value Stock with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Value investing analysis highlights FOX Corp (FOXA) as a decent value stock with strong valuation, 9/10 health, and 9/10 profitability ratings, trading at a low P/E of 11.36.
